name: French-Cheese Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the blue cheese in a blender container.
2. Blend until the onion is finely chopped.
3. Add the crumbled blue cheese and blend until the cheese is fully incorporated.
4. Transfer the dressing to a jar or bottle and store in the refrigerator.
5. Shake the dressing before serving over salad.
Makes 2 cups.
